companions.description: Place supply decoupling capacitor close to V+ and V- pins.

input_common_mode.conditions: typical 5 V operation; conservative lower-rail clamp

output_swing.conditions: typical 5 V operation at the TI product-table load condition

output_current.conditions: typical product-table output current; not a guaranteed headphone-drive rating

opamp_evidence.review_note: LMV321 is selected as a low-voltage connectivity seed. Headphone-drive load, gain-bandwidth, compensation, and stability remain design-specific before fabrication-candidate use.

records.name: TI LM358 dual op-amp SOIC-8
records.description: One physical LM358 dual operational-amplifier package with two functional units and one required power unit.

companions.description: Place package supply decoupling close to pins 8 and 4.

opamp_evidence.review_note: TI SLOS068 proves the bounded single-supply, unity-gain-stable, low-current buffer/comparator operating envelope used by the reviewed MNA model. Noise, distortion, and general-purpose output swing remain design-specific review items.

records.name: onsemi MMBT3904 NPN small-signal transistor
records.description: Concrete NPN BJT seed part for low-current amplifier bias, switching, and small-signal stages.

companions.description: Emitter resistor or equivalent output-current sharing/current-limit review is required for Class AB output stages.

amplifier_output_evidence.review_note: Fabrication evidence is bounded to the declared FR-5 SOT-23 thermal path and conservative low-current headphone SOA; applied bias, distortion, and PCB temperature remain circuit-level gates.

peak_current.conditions: single-pulse peak; applied pulse must remain inside Figure 22 SOA

power_semiconductor_evidence.mounting_assumptions: Conservative 0.2 W DC boundary below the 225 mW FR-5 TA=25 C thermal limit and inside the manufacturer single-pulse SOA; applied validation must use actual ambient and board thermal path.
power_semiconductor_evidence.review_note: Source: onsemi MMBT3904LT1/D Rev. 14; SOT-23 Style 6.

notes: Analog bias, gain, noise, and distortion performance remain design-specific.

records.name: onsemi MMBT3906 PNP small-signal transistor
records.description: Concrete PNP BJT seed part for complementary low-current amplifier and bias stages.

companions.description: Emitter resistor or equivalent output-current sharing/current-limit review is required for Class AB output stages.

amplifier_output_evidence.review_note: Fabrication evidence is bounded to the declared FR-5 SOT-23 thermal path and conservative low-current headphone SOA; applied bias, distortion, and PCB temperature remain circuit-level gates.

peak_current.conditions: single-pulse peak magnitude; applied pulse must remain inside Figure 20 SOA

power_semiconductor_evidence.mounting_assumptions: Conservative 0.2 W DC boundary below the 225 mW FR-5 TA=25 C thermal limit and inside the manufacturer single-pulse SOA; applied validation must use actual ambient and board thermal path.
power_semiconductor_evidence.review_note: Source: onsemi MMBT3906LT1/D Rev. 14; SOT-23 Style 6.

notes: Analog bias, gain, noise, and distortion performance remain design-specific.

records.name: Blocked TO-220 NPN power output BJT placeholder
records.description: Fail-closed placeholder for NPN power amplifier output devices until pinout, thermal, and SOA evidence are modeled.

amplifier_output_evidence.review_note: Placeholder documents the required evidence for future power-output parts and must not be selected for fabrication.

derating_rules.description: Power transistor selection requires package thermal model, heatsink strategy, and board copper assumptions.
Power amplifier output devices require SOA checks for rail voltage, load impedance, and fault cases.

notes: Use explicit verified output transistor records before fabrication.

companions.description: Place a local decoupling capacitor close to VDD/VDDIO and GND.
I2C mode requires pull-ups on SDA and SCL.

sensor_evidence.review_note: I2C mode requires CSB high and SDO at a defined address-select level.

notes: Record supports I2C mode through SDA/SDI and SCL/SCK aliases.

records.name: Bosch BMP280 I2C/SPI pressure and temperature sensor

companions.description: Place local decoupling close to VDD/VDDIO and GND.
I2C mode requires an SDA pull-up and a compatible SCL pull-up policy.

sensor_evidence.review_note: Bosch BST-BMP280-DS001-26 requires CSB tied to VDDIO for I2C and SDO at a defined address-select level.

notes: Connectivity profile is limited to I2C mode at address 0x76 or 0x77.

records.name: Sensirion SHT31-DIS I2C humidity and temperature sensor

companions.description: Place a 100 nF local decoupling capacitor close to VDD and VSS.
I2C mode requires pull-ups on SDA and SCL.

sensor_evidence.review_note: Sensirion SHT3x-DIS v7 requires ADDR at a defined level, R tied to VSS, and ALERT left floating when unused.

notes: Connectivity profile is limited to I2C mode at address 0x44 or 0x45.

records.name: Omron B3U-1000P tactile switch
records.description: Two-terminal normally-open SMD tactile switch with a one-pad-per-terminal KiCad land pattern.

notes: Exact procurement lifecycle and ratings remain a fabrication-time selection responsibility.

records.name: Espressif ESP32-WROOM-32E-N4 module
records.description: Concrete 4 MB flash ESP32-WROOM-32E module with reviewed power, boot-strap, UART, peripheral-role, land-pattern, and PCB-antenna constraints.

companions.description: Place local high-frequency bypass capacitance at module pin 2.
Provide local bulk energy storage for radio current transients.
EN requires the reviewed 10 kΩ pull-up and 1 µF delay capacitor.
GPIO0 requires a normal-boot pull-up and a controlled download-mode path.
Expose 3.3 V, GND, U0RXD, and U0TXD for firmware loading.

selection_rules.description: Deterministic default roles use non-flash pins and avoid boot straps.
These module pins cannot be assigned output roles.
Loads on these pins must preserve the reviewed reset-time strap levels.
Integrated-flash signals are unavailable to the generated design.

constraints.description: KiCad F.CrtYd envelope including the PCB-antenna exclusion, verified from RF_Module:ESP32-WROOM-32E.
KiCad footprint and block realization preserve the Espressif base-board antenna exclusion.
PCB antenna faces an unobstructed board edge.

notes: Only the N4 PCB-antenna module and the encoded deterministic peripheral assignments are promoted; other ESP32 modules remain unsupported.

companions.description: Place decoupling capacitors near VCC/AVCC and GND pins.
RESET requires a pull-up unless held by another verified circuit.
Expose SPI programming pins and reset for firmware loading.

notes: Minimal-system record. Peripheral suitability and clock/fuse choices remain design-specific.

companions.description: Crystal load capacitors must be selected from crystal load capacitance and board stray capacitance.
Select load capacitors from the crystal load capacitance and estimated board stray capacitance.

placement_hints.description: Place close to MCU oscillator pins with short symmetric traces.

routing_hints.description: Keep XTAL loop short and isolated from fast switching nets.

notes: Oscillator startup margin and exact load-capacitor calculation remain design-specific.

records.name: TI TXS0104EPW four-bit bidirectional level translator
records.description: Four-channel auto-direction bidirectional translator for open-drain and push-pull digital signals across two reviewed supply domains.

companions.description: Place a 100 nF bypass capacitor close to VCCA and GND.
Place a 100 nF bypass capacitor close to VCCB and GND.

notes: VCCA must remain less than or equal to VCCB; supply sequencing remains a fabrication-stage constraint.
OE is referenced to VCCA; power-up sequencing or a reviewed pull-down network must keep outputs high-impedance until both rails are stable.
External pull-up loading, edge-rate, and bus-capacitance limits remain design-specific fabrication checks.

companions.description: Power sink mode requires Rd pull-down on CC1.
Power sink mode requires Rd pull-down on CC2.
Add ESD protection for exposed connector pins when required by product environment.

notes: Power-only record. Do not use for USB2 or high-speed data routing.

records.name: Generic 5 V unidirectional TVS protection diode

notes: Generic TVS record; exact surge, capacitance, and clamping ratings required before fabrication.
